title: The Observer Effect in Machine Systems

analysis.object: T615: The Observer Effect in Machine Systems depth analysis

machine_observation.description: Machine observation: EML-2 measurement; camera, sensor, data collection
machine_observation.reason: Machine observer is EML-2: physical measurement without self-referential depth change

no_depth_change.description: Machine observation does not change depth of observed system; EML-2 neutral
no_depth_change.reason: Machine measurement is EML-2 neutral: no TYPE3 observer effect without EML-inf consciousness

qualia_required.description: True observer effect (T784) requires EML-inf observer; machines are EML-2 detectors
qualia_required.reason: Observer effect in QM: EML-inf consciousness may be required; EML-2 machine cannot provide

analysis.theorem: T615: The Observer Effect in Machine Systems (S894).

key_theorem: T615: The Observer Effect in Machine Systems (S894).
